problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
